---
title: "Outpatient"
---
<div id="kill-the-footer"></div>
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
source("utils.R")
```

## [FMLA: Forms](https://www.dol.gov/agencies/whd/fmla/forms)

* [Employee’s serious health condition, form WH-380-E](https://www.dol.gov/sites/dolgov/files/WHD/legacy/files/WH-380-E.pdf)
